   &NumOfAuxCBasisFuncts [&Type "Integer"] 0
   &NumOfAuxJBasisFuncts [&Type "Integer"] 0
   &NumOfAuxJKBasisFuncts [&Type "Integer"] 0
   &NumOfCABSBasisFuncts [&Type "Integer"] 0
$End
$Calculation_Timings
   &GeometryIndex 7
   &GSTEP [&Type "Double"]       2.3736999999999786e-02
   &XTB [&Type "Double"]       9.1145900000000002e-01
   &XTBGRAD [&Type "Double"]       3.0739999999999101e-03
   &SUM [&Type "Double"]       9.3826999999999972e-01
$End
